title: Did Oliver Tree Investigate UFO Bases & Then Get Killed to Cover Up What He Found?
description: By Lisa Haven Oliver Tree dies in a helicopter crash... and suddenly the internet uncovers an Antarctica documentary that was supposed to come out with his album — but never got a clean public release. Now the rumors are flying: [...]

title: Boffin who thinks aliens are watching Earth joins Donald Trump's new UFO squad
description: Harvard's Avi Loeb has joined Donald Trump's new UFO task force to help probe mysterious UAP sightings, bringing along his team of elite scientists

title: Apple’s Eddy Cue, Jerry Bruckheimer Open Up on ‘F1’ Sequel Plans, UFO Thriller at Cannes Lions
description: Apple's senior VP of services also discussed his flexible approach to theatrical windows and why he is betting on "the best, not the most" content in his appearance on the Croisette before being honored.

title: ‘Alien attack’ scare in Brazil: UFO panic grips after hackers hijack emergency alert system
description: A cyber breach in Brazil triggers fake emergency alerts, including alien invasion warnings, sending thousands into panic before authorities shut down the system.

title: 5 real UFO coverups you missed in 'Disclosure Day'
description: How real-life intelligence programs inspired the plot
